title: Pokkiri Raja
subTitle: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.

title: USA Weekly News
subTitle: The host presents the latest social and economic news stories about the Malayali diaspora in the USA, along with updates on various cultural events and interviews.

title: Singam II
subTitle: Durai Singam, a policeman working an undercover operation, attempts to eliminate a drug trafficking ring in the coastal town of Thoothukudi.

title: Mersal
subTitle: Maaran, a doctor, is falsely arrested for the murder of his colleague, Dr Arjun Zachariah. He soon discovers that the real culprit is a lookalike who aims to expose corruption in the medical industry.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Maari 2
subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

title: Kuruvi
subTitle: Vitrivel becomes caught in a web of crime and violence when he tracks down a man who holds his father as bonded labour along with many innocent people.

title: Pon Manickavel
subTitle: Pon Manickavel, IPS officer, is given the task to solve the case of a judge's murder. While his team attempts to crack the crime, the life of high profile persons are threatened.

title: Transit 17
subTitle: A team of resistance soldiers is on a mission to save humanity from the grips of a deadly virus and protect a girl who might lead them to the cure.

title: Chakra
subTitle: A carefully planned mass robbery causes a police officer and a soldier to team up with each other and carry out an investigation, which reveals a vast syndicate of cybercriminals.

title: HIT: The Third Case
subTitle: The Homicide Intervention Team dispatches relentless officer Arjun Sarkar to track down a band of murderers and put an end to their gruesome killing spree.

subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.

title: Shyam Singha Roy
subTitle: A director accused of plagiarism finds a transcendental connection to his past life when he digs deeper into his subconscious mind.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: PK
subTitle: A naive alien comes to Earth where he loses his device. As he spends time on the planet looking for it, he raises many thought-provoking questions that capture the attention of a journalist.

title: Male Fox Tale 3
subTitle: A 300-year-old teenager, Yun Yue and Bai Chen, the master of the fox clan, cross paths, uncovering a mystical tale of fate and the quest for immortality in a world full of secrets.

title: Poojai
subTitle: A temple priest gives evidence in court about a murder that he has witnessed. Unfortunately for him, he bears witness against an influential landlord.

title: Gajaana
subTitle: On an adventurous search for treasure in the dense forest, a group of young explorers soon discovers they have become the quarry.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: Satya, a doctor, is brutally beaten and driven out of his city by Guru, a ruthless gangster. However, Satya returns two years later as a police officer to exact revenge on Guru.

title: Aathi
subTitle: A young boy moves to Chennai for his education where he meets a girl and falls in love with her. Soon, they learn that they are both on a mission to avenge the death of their parents.

title: Vettai Puli
subTitle: A newly appointed officer is tasked with eliminating an extortion gang in the city. Unbeknownst to him, the gang's leader is someone close to him.
Armed with the art of modern warfare, Huang Xing and Sun Yat-sen lead an uprising against the Qing Dynasty that eventually that results in the founding of a new nation.

title: Puli
subTitle: Marudheeran goes on a quest to bring back his love, Pavazhamalli, who was kidnapped by the Vedhalams, a group that possesses mystical powers. He must face Yavanarani, a sorceress, and her aide.

title: Dora
subTitle: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.
